initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_category,
    d_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
FROM 
    store_sales,
    catalog_sales,
    web_sales,
    item,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_category,
    d_year
ORDER BY 
    i_category,
    d_year
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_category, 
    d_year, 
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales, 
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales, 
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
FROM 
    store_sales, 
    catalog_sales, 
    web_sales, 
    item, 
    date_dim
WHERE 
    store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
    AND catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
    AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_category, 
    d_year
ORDER BY 
    i_category, 
    d_year
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_category, 
    d_year, 
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales, 
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales, 
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
FROM 
    store_sales, 
    catalog_sales, 
    web_sales, 
    item, 
    date_dim
WHERE 
    store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
    AND catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
    AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk 
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_category, 
    d_year
ORDER BY 
    i_category, 
    d_year
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_category,
    d_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
FROM 
    store_sales,
    catalog_sales,
    web_sales,
    item,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_category,
    d_year
ORDER BY 
    i_category,
    d_year
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_category,
    d_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON item.i_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    i_category, d_year
ORDER BY 
    i_category, d_year
LIMIT 100;
